meta.question: Are there packages labled as obsolete or to be removed in the requirments hierarchy?
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, there are 2 packages in the requirements hierarchy labeled as obsolete or to be removed:

1. **"03b OLD: proposed requirements (to be replaced with DOORS imported ones)"** - Located in: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification::Requirements

2. **"01a Parent Requirements (OLD: to be removed once they no longer have links down to APS requirements)"** - Located in: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification::Requirements

Both packages are within the APS (Alignment and Phasing System) requirements hierarchy and are marked with "OLD" or "to be removed" labels indicating they are planned for removal or replacement.

events.output: I'll help you find packages labeled as obsolete or to be removed in the requirements hierarchy. Let me start by exploring the model to understand its structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 30

request.reason: Found initial packages. Need to search more specifically for packages with "obsolete", "deprecated", "to be removed" or similar labels in their names within the requirements hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("obsolete")) 
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("to be removed"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("old"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("remove")))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found packages with obsolete/deprecated labels. Need to filter specifically for those in the requirements hierarchy and verify which are actually requirement packages.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Requirements")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("obsolete")) 
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("to be removed"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("OLD:")))
}
LIMIT 30

request.reason: Found 2 requirement packages marked as obsolete/to be removed. Let me also check for any requirements inside these packages and verify they are in the requirements hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?pkg rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("requirement")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Requirement")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("OLD")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("obsolete")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("to be removed")))
}
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("deprecated")) 
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("OBSOLETE"))
       || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("OLD")))
}
LIMIT 50
